generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor receiving input current (I_M) and producing torque (τ_M) as output. Part of the first vertical axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot."
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox transforming torque and angular velocity from motor to output shaft. Part of the first vertical axis with manufacturer-provided parameters for dynamics modeling."
]

instance SiemensSinumerik840DslController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller executing control algorithms for separate axis control with inputs/outputs for position, speed, acceleration, and motor current."
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance MotorShaftEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "High-precision position encoder mounted on motor shaft providing angular position data for backlash and elasticity compensation."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorShaftEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance GearboxOutputEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder mounted behind gearbox providing angular position data for backlash and elasticity compensation."
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxOutputEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring input current (I_M) to derive torque (τ_M) via motor constants."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance MotorShaftEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorShaftEncoder
    base:desc "Time-series of angular position data from motor shaft encoder streamed via MQTT protocol."
]

instance GearboxOutputEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxOutputEncoder
    base:desc "Time-series of angular position data from gearbox output encoder streamed via MQTT protocol."
]

instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
    base:desc "Real-time input current (I_M) data streamed via MQTT protocol."
]

instance MeasuredTorqueVelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorShaftEncoder, GearboxOutputEncoder, MotorCurrentSensor
    base:desc "Derived torque/velocity arrays (r_M, r_G, r_out) computed from encoder and current data via dynamics models."
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance SysMLBlockDefinitionDiagram : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram (bdd) describing structural components (Motor, Gearbox, Axis) and their interconnections (rotational and current flows)."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLToolEnabler
]

instance SysMLInternalBlockDiagram : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram (ibd) instantiating the FirstAxis system with specific components (motor, gearwheel, cycloidal_gearbox)."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLToolEnabler
]

instance DynamicsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Manufacturer-provided dynamics models deriving torque, angular velocity, and acceleration from encoder data."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkMATLABEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box friction model implementing Coulomb-Viscous friction characteristics."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkMATLABEnabler
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box friction model implementing Stribeck effect for lubricated contacts."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkMATLABEnabler
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box friction model implementing Dahl's hysteresis model for pre-sliding behavior."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkMATLABEnabler
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box friction model implementing LuGre model for dynamic friction effects."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkMATLABEnabler
]

instance FrictionlessGearboxModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Ideal gearbox simulation model without friction effects for baseline comparison."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkMATLABEnabler
]

instance MotorSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Component-specific simulation model for permanent magnet synchronous motor (Simulation M)."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkMATLABEnabler
]

instance GearwheelSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Component-specific simulation model for gearwheel (Simulation GW)."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkMATLABEnabler
]

instance MeasuredInputCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series of input current (I_M) from motor current sensor."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkMATLABEnabler
]

instance MeasuredMotorTorqueVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured torque/velocity arrays (r_M) from motor shaft encoder and current sensor."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MeasuredTorqueVelocityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkMATLABEnabler
]

instance MeasuredGearboxTorqueVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured torque/velocity arrays (r_G) from gearbox output encoder."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MeasuredTorqueVelocityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkMATLABEnabler
]

instance MeasuredSystemOutputTorqueVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured torque/velocity arrays (r_out) from system output (estimated via dynamics models)."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MeasuredTorqueVelocityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkMATLABEnabler
]

instance SimulatedMotorTorqueVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated torque/velocity arrays (δr_M) processed via friction models and dynamics simulations."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MeasuredTorqueVelocityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkMATLABEnabler
]

instance SimulatedGearboxTorqueVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated torque/velocity arrays (δr_G) processed via friction models and dynamics simulations."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MeasuredTorqueVelocityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkMATLABEnabler
]

instance SimulatedSystemOutputTorqueVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated torque/velocity arrays (δr_out) processed via friction models and dynamics simulations."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MeasuredTorqueVelocityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkMATLABEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance SysMLToolEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML modeling tool enabling structural and logical architecture modeling via Block Definition Diagrams (bdd) and Internal Block Diagrams (ibd)."
    DTDFVocab:enables DigitalShadowModelingService
]

instance SimulinkMATLABEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink/MATLAB environment for executable friction and dynamics simulation models."
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelingService, DataDrivenSimulationService
]

instance MQTTProtocolEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time streaming of sensor data (I_M, encoder outputs) with traceability metadata."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataStreamingService
]

instance DigitalShadowReferenceModelEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "UML-based Digital Shadow Reference Model (DSRM) for traceability and metadata management linking data points to sources and processing models."
    DTDFVocab:enables TraceabilityService
]

instance UnifiedDashboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unified visualization dashboard displaying data traces, deviations, and system behavior."
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

// C6: Services
instance DigitalShadowModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service implementing SysML-based structural and behavioral modeling of the first axis components."
    DTDFVocab:provides StructuralBehavioralModelInsight
]

instance FrictionModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service combining white-box (Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre) and black-box friction models for real-time friction identification."
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionCharacterizationInsight
]

instance DataDrivenSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service simulating frictionless and friction-aware system behavior for comparison with measured data."
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationDeviationInsight
]

instance RealTimeDataStreamingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service streaming real-time sensor data (I_M, encoder outputs) via MQTT protocol with traceability metadata."
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeDataInsight
]

instance TraceabilityService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service linking data points to sources, processing models, and system properties (time intervals, configuration states)."
    DTDFVocab:provides TraceabilityMetadataInsight
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service displaying data traces (torque, angular velocity) and deviations in unified dashboard for operational monitoring."
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalMonitoringInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance StructuralBehavioralModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Structural and behavioral model of the first axis components including motor, gear transmission, and cycloidal gearbox."
]

instance FrictionCharacterizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identified static, kinetic, and viscous friction components in the gearbox via model deviation analysis."
]

instance SimulationDeviationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Comparison between simulated (δr) and measured (r) torque/velocity data to validate model accuracy."
]

instance RealTimeDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time streaming of sensor data (I_M, encoder outputs) with traceability to specific MQTT channels."
]

instance TraceabilityMetadataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Metadata linking data points to sources (MQTT channels), processing models, and system properties."
]

instance OperationalMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of data traces and deviations for detecting anomalies like unexpected torque drops."
]

instance FrictionCompensationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Data-driven friction compensation inputs for Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl controller."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// C1: Environment
instance FirstAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Environment containing the first vertical axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot with working range [-90°, 90°] and maximum angular speed 75°/s."
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, CycloidalGearbox, SiemensSinumerik840DslController,
                 MotorShaftEncoder, GearboxOutputEncoder, MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance DigitalShadowProcessingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Centralized digital shadow processing environment containing all models, data, and enablers."
    base:contains SysMLBlockDefinitionDiagram, SysMLInternalBlockDiagram, DynamicsModel,
                 CoulombViscousFrictionModel, StribeckFrictionModel, DahlFrictionModel, LuGreFrictionModel,
                 FrictionlessGearboxModel, MotorSimulationModel, GearwheelSimulationModel,
                 MeasuredInputCurrentData, MeasuredMotorTorqueVelocityData, MeasuredGearboxTorqueVelocityData,
                 MeasuredSystemOutputTorqueVelocityData, SimulatedMotorTorqueVelocityData,
                 SimulatedGearboxTorqueVelocityData, SimulatedSystemOutputTorqueVelocityData,
                 SysMLToolEnabler, SimulinkMATLABEnabler, MQTTProtocolEnabler,
                 DigitalShadowReferenceModelEnabler, UnifiedDashboardEnabler
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The **virtual-to-physical (DT→PT) interaction is absent** in this digital shadow implementation. The DS is a **one-way data flow system** (per Kritzinger et al. [32]), meaning it **does not send commands, corrections, or adjustments back to the physical system**. However, the **insights generated by the DS** (e.g., friction model improvements) can be **manually integrated into control algorithms** (e.g., via Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl) to indirectly improve PT performance."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The **twinning time scale** is **real-time (online)** with:
    - **Continuous data acquisition**: Sensor data (e.g., *I_M*, encoder outputs) is streamed via **MQTT** with **high temporal resolution** (not explicitly quantified but implied to be **sub-millisecond to millisecond** for control purposes).
    - **Dynamic model updates**: Friction models are **continuously identified and refined** during operation to account for **wear, tool changes, or environmental factors** (e.g., temperature).
    - **Synchronization**: The DS **does not actively synchronize with the PT** (passive system), but **data traces are time-stamped** for retrospective analysis. The **dashboard provides live visualization** of deviations between simulated and measured data."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The **DT constellation** is a **purpose-driven, centralized system** with:
    - **Single Asset Focus**: The DS is **specific to the first axis** of the MABI MAX 100 robot, with no horizontal or vertical scaling described.
    - **Component Orchestration**:
        - **Sources**: Physical sensors (encoders, current sensors) and **virtual sources** (simulation models).
        - **Processing**: Centralized **Simulation components** (*Simulation M*, *Simulation GW*, *Simulation GB*) that consume input traces and produce output traces.
        - **Models**: Linked via **DSRM associations** (e.g., *DataTrace* → *Processing* → *Model*).
    - **No External Integration**: The DS is **isolated** from other systems (e.g., no ERP, MES, or other DTs mentioned)."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The **life-cycle stages** covered by the DS include:
    - **As-operated phase**: The DS is **not a pre-manufacturing or design tool** but is **operational**, focusing on **real-time monitoring and friction analysis during runtime**.
    - **No as-designed or as-manufactured phases**: The DS does not model the **ideal (CAD) or manufactured (tolerances) states** but instead **compares simulated vs. measured data** to identify **operational deviations** (e.g., due to wear or friction).
    - **Continuous evolution**: The DS supports **dynamic updates** to friction models (e.g., via **online parameter identification**) to adapt to **changing physical conditions**."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The **fidelity and validity considerations** include:
    - **Model Fidelity**:
        - **White-box models** (analytical, e.g., Coulomb-Viscous) provide **physically interpretable parameters** but require **manual tuning**.
        - **Black-box models** (data-driven) **eliminate parameter identification** but lack **explainability**.
        - **Hybrid approach**: Combines both to **balance accuracy and interpretability**.
    - **Validation Mechanisms**:
        - **Deviation analysis**: Compare **simulated (ˆ*r*) vs. measured (*r*) data traces** to quantify errors.
        - **Traceability**: Links data points to **sources, processing models, and system properties** for debugging.
        - **No formal verification**: No mention of **certification, testing protocols, or uncertainty quantification** (e.g., Monte Carlo simulations).
    - **Error Sources**:
        - **Unmodeled dynamics** (e.g., gearbox elasticity not separately measured).
        - **Sensor noise** (e.g., encoder resolution limits).
        - **Environmental factors** (e.g., temperature, wear) not explicitly quantified."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The **technical connection** between PT and DT is:
    - **Protocol**: **MQTT** for **real-time, low-latency data streaming** from PT sensors to the DS.
    - **Architecture**:
        - **Centralized**: All data flows into a **unified processing system** (Simulink, dashboard).
        - **No cloud/edge distinction**: Assumed to be **on-premise** (no remote hosting mentioned).
    - **Data Format**:
        - **Time-series arrays** of torque (*τ*), angular velocity (*ω*), and current (*I_M*).
        - **Metadata** (source, timestamp, system properties) stored alongside data traces.
    - **No API/Service Bus**: Direct **point-to-point MQTT connections** from sensors to DS components."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The **hosting/deployment** details are:
    - **On-premise deployment**: The DS is **not cloud-hosted**; all processing (Simulink, dashboard) occurs **locally** on the robot’s control infrastructure.
    - **Hardware**: Assumed to be **co-located with the Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl controller** (no specific hardware mentioned).
    - **Software Stack**:
        - **Simulink/MATLAB** for simulation models.
        - **MQTT broker** for data streaming.
        - **Dashboard** (likely a **custom web-based UI** or **Siemens-specific tool**) for visualization.
    - **No containerization/virtualization**: No mention of **Docker, Kubernetes, or VMs**."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The **standardization** efforts include:
    - **SysML** (for **system modeling**, per [17], [27]) as the **architecture description language (ADL)**.
    - **Digital Shadow Reference Model (DSRM)** (UML-based, per [15], [38]) for **conceptual modeling and traceability**.
    - **Asset Administration Shell (AAS)** (implied but not detailed) for **model-data integration** (per [AAS standard]).
    - **No explicit industry standards**: No mention of **ISO, IEC, or OPC UA** for interoperability or security."
]
